name: windows-demo
description: windows-demo - rill hello world for Windows

scripts.bundle: react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform windows --dev false --bundle-output windows/WindowsDemo.Package/Bundle/index.windows.bundle --assets-dest windows/WindowsDemo.Package/Bundle
scripts.bundle:dev: react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform windows --dev true --bundle-output windows/WindowsDemo.Package/Bundle/index.windows.bundle --assets-dest windows/WindowsDemo.Package/Bundle
